source_refs: blueprint/phase-3-the-human-checkpoint.md#Message and callback flow / Phase 3 dispatch and callback split
contract.rationale: Request-level interchange is allowed only as a governed package emitted from settled aggregate truth and frozen evidence.

identifierPolicy.label: Request version fingerprint
identifierPolicy.description: Task logical ids are derived from request lineage and the aggregate version hash.
identifierPolicy.versionRule: Logical id is stable per aggregate version; new version emits new versionId only.

cardinalityPolicy.label: One task plus bounded document set
cardinalityPolicy.description: One Request aggregate version emits exactly one primary Task and zero or more supporting DocumentReference rows.

redactionPolicy.label: Minimal partner interchange
redactionPolicy.description: Only partner-required structured fields and declared profile elements may cross the boundary.

companionArtifactPolicy.label: Partner exchange manifest
companionArtifactPolicy.description: External bundles may carry an omission/redaction manifest that traces every excluded artifact or field to policy.

replayPolicy.label: Stable set by aggregate version
replayPolicy.description: Replaying the same aggregate version rematerializes the same resource membership and identifier set.

supersessionPolicy.label: Append-only by aggregate version
supersessionPolicy.description: New aggregate versions append new representation sets and explicitly supersede prior versions without mutating history.

callbackCorrelationPolicy.label: No callback correlation
callbackCorrelationPolicy.description: Clinical persistence-only contracts do not participate in partner callback correlation.

exchangeBundlePolicies.authoritativeSuccess: Declared partner acceptance plus durable correlation of the emitted document bundle.
exchangeBundlePolicies.supersessionBehavior: New request version or snapshot hash supersedes the older bundle and retires its writable use.
exchangeBundlePolicies.invalidationBehavior: Any missing snapshot parity, redaction drift, or route-intent mismatch invalidates the bundle.
